description: Defines what the Apply Door is permitted to write. Anything not listed here is refused.

PATCH_JSON.notes: V1 only allows replace and add. Destructive ops are refused.

ADD_FLAG.notes: Appends a flag to the artifact's risk_flags array. Non-destructive.

REMOVE_FLAG.notes: Removes a flag from risk_flags array. Non-destructive (array shrink only). V1 supported.

ADD_DOC_REFERENCE.notes: Writes a reference metadata stub only. No file copies.

REQUIRE_REEXPORT_BUNDLE.notes: Cascade marker only. No artifact mutation. Writes marker file.

REQUIRE_RERUN_PORT1.notes: Cascade marker only. Writes marker file.

REQUIRE_RERUN_PORT2.notes: Cascade marker only. Writes marker file.

REQUIRE_REBUILD_PORT3.notes: Cascade marker only. Writes marker file.

refused_action_types.RECLASSIFY_DOC: Refused in V1. Too risky without full doc pipeline.

PAYMENT_MODEL.notes: Allow patching derived totals, intake summary totals, liability year data, capacity figures. Refuse identity fields.

STRATEGY.notes: Allow patching flags, assumptions, strategy notes. Refuse identity and input reference fields.

LIABILITY_SNAPSHOT.notes: LIABILITY_SNAPSHOT patches target the liability_summary section of payment_plan_model.json. Refuse creating new tax year entries in V1.

PACKAGE.notes: REFUSED. Package is a PORT3 output artifact. Do not patch — rebuild PORT3 instead.

exit_codes.2: REFUSED_VALIDATION — schema invalid, disallowed path, disallowed action, destructive op, or drift detected
exit_codes.3: REFUSED_APPROVAL — missing or invalid approval proof
exit_codes.4: INTERNAL_ERROR — unexpected failure; no partial writes
